title: Syndrome Tag
description: Syndromic classification for a single encounter. Tags are limited to target syndromes plus other/unclear. Every tag must include trigger evidence. Trigger quotes must be verbatim substrings of note_text (enforced by validator, not schema).

syndrome_tag.description: Extensible: add new syndrome values here as needed

trigger_quotes.description: Verbatim substrings from the note that triggered this classification. Must be actual substrings of note_text (enforced by validator/tests).

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of why this syndrome was selected
